categoryDescription: Begin your culinary journey with our exquisite selection of handcrafted appetizers.

items.name: STUFFED MUSHROOMS
items.description: Flavorful, filled with panko bread crumbs, pine nuts, parsley, sun-tomatoes, and cheese.

items.name: ITALIAN PASTA
items.description: Greek yogurt filling instead of a traditional cream cheese one.

items.name: TURKEY SANDWICH
items.description: Drizzle these colorful sandwich with an easy balsamic for a pop of sweet flavor.

items.name: GREEK SALAD
items.description: Tomatoes, green bell pepper, sliced cucumber onion, olives, and feta cheese.

categoryDescription: Savor our meticulously prepared entrees, crafted to delight your palate.

items.name: BEEF TARTARE
items.description: Flavorful, filled with panko bread crumbs, pine nuts, parsley, sun-dried tomatoes, and cheese.

items.name: LASAGNE
items.description: Tomatoes, green bell pepper, sliced cucumber onion, olives, and feta cheese.

items.name: BUTTERNUT PUMPKIN
items.description: Greek yogurt filling instead of a traditional cream cheese one.

items.name: CAPRESE SKEWERS
items.description: Drizzle these colorful skewers with an easy balsamic for a pop of sweet flavor.

categoryDescription: Refresh yourself with our signature cocktails and classic beverages.

items.name: MARTINI
items.description: A classic martini is made with gin, dry vermouth, and a lemon peel or olives for garnish.

items.name: MARGARITA
items.description: A classic margarita contains tequila, orange liqueur, and fresh lime juice.

items.name: OLD FASHIONED
items.description: The drink is typically made with bourbon or rye whiskey and sweetened with a sugar cube.

items.name: MOJITO
items.description: A Mojito is made with white rum, fresh mint leaves, fresh lime juice, sugar.

categoryDescription: Indulge in our decadent sweets to perfectly conclude your meal.

items.name: CHOCOLATE MOUSSE
items.description: chocolate, heavy cream, eggs (yolks and whites, separated), and sugar as the core ingredients.

items.name: PAVLOVA
items.description: egg, sugar, cornstarch, and an acid like vinegar or lemon juice for the meringue base.

items.name: APPLE CRUMBLE
items.description: apples, flour, sugar (granulated and/or brown), and butter for both the filling and topping.

items.name: CRÈME BRÛLÉE
items.description: heavy cream, egg yolks, sugar (for the custard and topping), and vanilla.
